title: TUI Phase 2: subissues, related issues, milestone in detail view + tree view
description: Enhance detail view with subissues, related issues, milestone. Add tree view mode toggled with 't' key. Migrated from crosslink/ subdir issue #2.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--tui-dashboard
comments.content: [plan] (1) Enhance detail view to include subissues, related issues, and milestone — matching show.rs output. (2) Add tree view mode toggled with 't', shows parent/child hierarchy with indentation.
